COARDS, CF-1.6, ACDD-1.3, NCCSV-1.1: Streamflow is measured using active USGS gages (http://waterdata.usgs.gov/nwis/sw) with records that meet or exceed 30 years in duration.; Additional Calculations: Average daily values from 213 gages were used to calculate annual 1-day maximum flows.
